title: Protobots (No-code AI Platform)
description: Built TaskBots/ChatBots platform with multi-LLM support, relay proxy, usage/cost tracking, event-driven LLM Functions, activity logs, notifications, emails, and dynamic welcome banners.

title: Bectzn (Social Platform)
description: End-to-end delivery of a social platform for election enthusiasts with Google Autocomplete, geolocation, Ballotpedia API, Perplexity-generated profiles, and Stripe donations.

title: CraftOs (Web + Desktop)
description: Custom HR management platform with role-based auth, notifications, third-party integrations, CI/CD, and Electron desktop app for task tracking.

title: Lumi-PassPort (Web App)
description: Interactive educational platform: React front-end, Rails APIs, admin dashboards, Insendi, Chart.js, PDF rendering, dynamic modals, and digital credentials.

title: AI Carousel Maker
description: AI-powered tool to generate team-ready PDF carousels for productivity sharing.

title: Age Calculator
description: Lightweight utility to compute age with precise date math.

title: Instagram to PDF Generator
description: Script to extract Instagram carousel images and generate shareable PDFs.

title: MR_PORTFOLIO (3D Portfolio)
description: Interactive 3D portfolio built with Three.js and modern web tooling.
